allow: Bash(python3 -c " import json, sys from datetime import datetime data = json.load\(sys.stdin\) today = '2026-04-23' for pr in data: if pr['updatedAt'][:10] == today: print\(pr\) ")

Bash(python3 -c " import json, sys from datetime import datetime, timezone events = json.load\(sys.stdin\) today = '2026-04-24' for e in events: created = e.get\('created_at', ''\) if created.startswith\(today\): print\(f\\"{e['type']} | {e.get\('repo', {}\).get\('name', ''\)} | {json.dumps\(e.get\('payload', {}\)\)[:300]}\\"\) ")

Bash(python3 -c " import json, sys events = json.load\(sys.stdin\) today = '2026-04-24' for e in events: created = e.get\('created_at', ''\) if created.startswith\(today\): etype = e['type'] repo = e.get\('repo', {}\).get\('name', ''\) payload = e.get\('payload', {}\) print\(f'TYPE: {etype}'\) print\(f'REPO: {repo}'\) if etype == 'PushEvent': for c in payload.get\('commits', []\): print\(f' COMMIT: {c[\\"sha\\"][:7]} {c[\\"message\\"]}'\) elif etype == 'PullRequestEvent': pr = payload.get\('pull_request', {}\) print\(f' PR: #{pr.get\(\\"number\\"\)} {pr.get\(\\"title\\"\)} action={payload.get\(\\"action\\"\)}'\) elif etype == 'CreateEvent': print\(f' ref_type={payload.get\(\\"ref_type\\"\)} ref={payload.get\(\\"ref\\"\)}'\) elif etype == 'DeleteEvent': print\(f' ref_type={payload.get\(\\"ref_type\\"\)} ref={payload.get\(\\"ref\\"\)}'\) print\(\) ")

Bash(python3 -c " import sys, json for line in sys.stdin: try: d = json.loads\(line\) if d.get\('type'\) == 'user' or d.get\('type'\) == 'assistant': msg = d.get\('message', {}\) role = msg.get\('role', ''\) content = msg.get\('content', ''\) if isinstance\(content, list\): for c in content: if isinstance\(c, dict\) and c.get\('type'\) == 'text': text = c.get\('text', ''\)[:300] print\(f'[{role}]: {text}'\) elif isinstance\(content, str\): print\(f'[f{role}]: {content[:300]}'\) except: pass ")
